input.user_input: The section numbering in the employment agreement is off — Section 7 is duplicated. Renumber everything from Section 7 onward.

actual: I don't see an employment agreement attached to your message. Please upload or provide the document, and I will be happy to fix the duplicated Section 7, renumber the subsequent sections, and update any affected cross-references for you.
